title: Bluetooth Bicycle Speedometer
description: Arduino Nano-based bicycle computer measuring wheel speed via Hall-effect sensor, displaying speed and trip distance on a 0.96" OLED, and streaming data to a companion BLE smartphone app over a BLE GATT characteristic.
objective: Measure and display speed to ±0.2 km/h; accumulate trip distance to ±10 m per 100 km; stream speed + distance to BLE app at 1 Hz; powered by USB power bank for ≥ 8 h.
constraints: Weatherproof enclosure (IP54 minimum); ≤ £20 BOM; 5 V USB power; Arduino Nano 33 BLE or Nano + HM-10 BLE module.
supporting_fact_titles: Hall-Effect Speed Sensor for Rotating Machinery
Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) for App Control
OLED SSD1306 Monochrome Display I²C Interface
design_element_titles: Hall-Effect Reed Switch Wheel Speed Sensor

element_usage_notes.Hall-Effect Reed Switch Wheel Speed Sens: A3144 on fork; 1 neodymium spoke magnet; 1 pulse/rev; interrupt on D2 (INT0); wheel circumference configurable (default 2096 mm for 700c × 25c).
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: 3-line layout: line 1 = speed km/h (large font), line 2 = trip distance km, line 3 = elapsed time. Refreshed at 2 Hz.
element_usage_notes.BLE GATT Smartphone App Interface: HM-10 UART module (TX→D10, RX→D11 SoftwareSerial); sends JSON {spd_kmh, dist_km, trip_s} at 1 Hz. nRF Connect or custom app.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano 3.0; Hall sensor on D2 (INT0); I²C OLED on A4/A5; HM-10 on SoftwareSerial D10/D11; 5 V from USB power bank.

element_interactions.from: Hall-Effect Reed Switch Wheel Speed Sensor
element_interactions.data: Interrupt pulse on D2 (rising edge, 1 pulse/revolution)
element_interactions.description: ISR records micros() timestamp; main loop computes period = t_current − t_prev, then speed = circumference / period. Timeout (>3 s since last pulse) = 0 km/h.
Display updated at 2 Hz. Speed uses large font (textSize 2); distance and time use textSize 1 on lower rows.

element_interactions.data: JSON string via UART at 9600 baud, once per second
element_interactions.description: HM-10 bridges UART to BLE GATT characteristic. Smartphone app subscribes to notify characteristic and renders speed chart.
